text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I sure sang my heart out! After putting my
all into karaoke, I'm sure training is gonna to go
great toda—

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it isn't Kita! We're holding a local enka
singing competition, so why don't you come by
and listen to some songs?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: An enka competition?! Awesome! I'll be there!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wow... "Tears Upon the Turf" is such a fantastic
song!
choice_data_list:
That title perfectly describes how I felt when
you didn't arrive for practice.

That title perfectly describes how I felt when
you didn't arrive for practice.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh, Trainer? What are you talking about
practice fo—

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! I can't believe it's already so late! I'm
sorryyy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Kitasan Black genuinely didn't notice the
time, so I give her a warning and tell her to be
more careful in the future.
